questionHtml:
In cats, black coat colour is dominant over gray. A female black cat, whose mother is gray, mates with a gray male. What is the predicted ratio of phenotypes in the offspring?

A.  100 % black

B.  50 % black to 50 % gray

C.  75 % black to 25 % gray

D.  100 % gray

meta.title: In cats, black coat colour is dominant over gray. A female black cat, whose mother is gray, mates with a gray male. What is the predicted ratio of phenotypes in the offspring? A. 1
